asset_name: Semaglutide Safety, Contraindication and Living Evidence Closure
status: SOURCE CLOSED WITHIN DEFINED SCOPE / LIVING EVIDENCE ACTIVE
evidence_grade: A1/B1 — current label plus primary clinical evidence
controlled_conclusion: Current label controls include thyroid C-cell tumour warning, pancreatitis, gallbladder disease, hypoglycaemia in relevant combinations, acute kidney injury from volume depletion, severe gastrointestinal reactions, hypersensitivity, diabetic-retinopathy complications, heart-rate increase and pulmonary aspiration during anaesthesia or deep sedation.

sources.title: WEGOVY current United States prescribing information
Once-weekly semaglutide in adults with overweight or obesity
Semaglutide and cardiovascular outcomes in obesity without diabetes

transfer_prohibited: Transfer from authorised finished product to catalogue supplier powder

Assumption of supplier purity, potency, sterility, stability or equivalence
